text:
Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed are primarily related to complications from chronic kidney disease and infections, with no mention of lipid levels or management of lipid disorders. Additionally, the absence of prescribed medications related to lipid management further supports the conclusion that there is no active diagnosis or management of a lipid disorder at this time. Therefore, it is unlikely that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit.
